description_long: This is a modern double bed featuring a bold black bedspread with white, irregular zigzag and wavy line patterns, giving it a contemporary and artistic flair. The bed is topped with a set of white pillows and a white sheet or runner that contrasts sharply with the dark bedding. The headboard is a simple, flat, rectangular panel in black, providing a minimalist backdrop. The bedspread drapes over the sides, partially concealing the bed frame and creating a soft, inviting appearance. The overall silhouette is low and wide, suggesting a comfortable and spacious sleeping area. The materials and design evoke a sense of urban sophistication, suitable for a stylish apartment or loft.
description: A modern double bed with a black and white zigzag-patterned bedspread, white pillows, and a minimalist black headboard. The design is bold, contemporary, and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the bed, the black headboard, and the striking black bedspread with white zigzag lines.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the white pillows, the white sheet or runner, and the draped bedspread over the side.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the black headboard and the symmetrical arrangement of pillows and bedding.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, again showing the white pillows and the distinctive zigzag pattern on the bedspread.
